name: framer-pp-mcp
description: CLI for managing Framer websites — CMS, canvas, code files, publishing, and site migration. Requires Node.

framer_api_key.title: FRAMER_API_KEY
framer_api_key.description: Sets FRAMER_API_KEY for the Framer MCP server.

framer_project_url.title: FRAMER_PROJECT_URL
framer_project_url.description: URL of the Framer project to operate on (e.g. https://framer.com/projects/Your-Project--abc123). Required by every live bridge command.
